mapper.select: SELECT s.*, COALESCE(COUNT(p.id), 0) AS product_count FROM scenes s LEFT JOIN products p ON p.scene_id = s.id AND p.is_published = TRUE WHERE s.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.slug, s.description, s.hero_copy, s.sort_order, s.is_active, s.created_at, s.updated_at ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.id ASC

SELECT s.*, COALESCE(COUNT(p.id), 0) AS product_count FROM scenes s LEFT JOIN products p ON p.scene_id = s.id GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.slug, s.description, s.hero_copy, s.sort_order, s.is_active, s.created_at, s.updated_at ORDER BY s.sort_order ASC, s.id ASC

SELECT s.*, COALESCE(COUNT(p.id), 0) AS product_count FROM scenes s LEFT JOIN products p ON p.scene_id = s.id AND p.is_published = TRUE WHERE s.slug = #{slug} AND s.is_active = TRUE GROUP BY s.id, s.name, s.slug, s.description, s.hero_copy, s.sort_order, s.is_active, s.created_at, s.updated_at
